mapper.select: SELECT '셀가족 공동체' AS headline, '성도모임부 하위 셀가족 공동체가 말씀과 교제로 연결되어 함께 성장합니다.' AS summary, 'D000002' AS parent_dept_cd

SELECT child.dept_cd AS dept_code, child.dept_nm AS title, child.dept_cd AS subtitle, COALESCE(NULLIF(child.remark, ''), child.dept_nm || ' 셀가족 공동체입니다.') AS description, CASE WHEN leader.grade_code IS NOT NULL THEN leader.name_ko ELSE NULL END AS pastor_name, CASE WHEN leader.position_code IN ('103-010', '103-020', '103-030') THEN leader.name_ko ELSE NULL END AS elder_name, CASE WHEN child.dept_cd LIKE 'D00001%' THEN '주중 오전/오후 셀 모임' WHEN child.dept_cd LIKE 'D000019' OR child.dept_cd LIKE 'D000020' THEN '주말 청년 셀 모임' ELSE '정기 셀 모임' END AS meeting_info, NULL AS image_url FROM hrm_org_dept child LEFT JOIN hrm_person leader ON child.chef_emp_no = leader.employee_no WHERE child.parent_dept_key = ( SELECT dept_key FROM hrm_org_dept WHERE dept_cd = #{parentDeptCd} AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ) AND child.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY child.dept_cd

SELECT person.name_ko AS name, CASE WHEN person.employee_no = dept.chef_emp_no THEN '셀리더' ELSE COALESCE(position_code.code_name, grade_code.code_name, '셀원') END AS role FROM hrm_person person JOIN hrm_org_dept dept ON person.dept_cd = dept.dept_cd LEFT JOIN common_code grade_code ON person.grade_code = grade_code.code AND grade_code.parent_code = '102' AND grade_code.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code position_code ON person.position_code = position_code.code AND position_code.parent_code = '103' AND position_code.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE person.dept_cd = #{deptCode} AND person.service_status_code = '101-010' ORDER BY CASE WHEN person.employee_no = dept.chef_emp_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(grade_code.sort_order, position_code.sort_order, 9999), person.employee_no
